configuration.title: AmxModX Configuration
command.compile.title: Compile Plugin
command.compileLocal.title: Compile Plugin Local
project.type.description: How the extension discovers include paths and compiler settings.
project.type.auto: Use amxxpack if .amxxpack.json is present in the workspace root, otherwise fall back to amxmodx.compiler.* settings.
project.type.default: Ignore .amxxpack.json even when it is present.
project.type.amxxpack: Require .amxxpack.json; report an error when it is missing.
project.configFile.description: Path to the amxxpack config, relative to the workspace root (or absolute).
language.reparseInterval.description: The shortest allowed interval between two syntax re-parses of the same file.
language.webApiLinks.description: Should #include statements that contain filenames from the AMXX package link to the Web API Reference.
compiler.includePaths.description: An array of strings containing include paths for the compiler.
compiler.options.description: An array of additional options that should be passed to the compiler.
compiler.showInfoMessages.description: Shows additional information like command arguments and exit code when compiling.
compiler.reformatOutput.description: Should amxxpc output be reformatted to make it more readable.
compiler.outputType.description: Where .amxx files should be output. Can be 'source' (same directory as input) or 'path' (the directory named by amxmodx.compiler.outputPath).
compiler.outputPath.description: If amxmodx.compiler.outputType is set to 'path', use this directory to output .amxx files.
compiler.switchToOutput.description: Switch to the 'Output' tab on build.
